ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2011 Continued To Nov-23-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-20-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha , CSR: Susan Lee #4280

Saul Ferster, Esq. appeared for and with the plaintiff John E. Wai, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Robert Clayborn as follows:

Principal - $71,976.35
Prejudgment Interest - $20,617.52
Attorney fees - $6,980.00
Costs - $910.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $100,483.87

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
